verse.name: V1
verse.lines: In my wrestling and in my doubts In my failures You won't walk out Your great love will lead me through You are the peace in my troubled sea You are the peace in my troubled sea

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: In the silence, You won't let go In the questions, Your truth will hold Your great love will lead me through You are the peace in my troubled sea You are the peace in my troubled sea

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: My lighthouse, my lighthouse Shining in the darkness. I will follow You My lighthouse, my lighthouse I will trust the promise. You will carry me safe to shore Safe to shore, Safe to shore Safe to shore

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: I won't fear what tomorrow brings With each morning I'll rise and sing My God's love will lead me through You are the peace in my troubled sea You are the peace in my troubled sea

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: /: Fire before us. You're the brightest You will lead us through the storms :/ 4x
